creator: dominik.lisiak@bemsoft.pl
text:
Created attachment 226530
Invalid Response from FreeBSD.org as .eml

I've recently subscribed to freebsd-ports@FreeBSD.org mailing list. After sending email to this address I received a response with modified "From" header, but with DKIM-Signature header still copied from the original SMTP server (mail.bemsoft.pl). This causes the mail to be categorized as spam.

The mailing list server should either remove the original DKIM-Signature header or better replace it with new one for FreeBSD.org domain.

I've attached the invalid response.
